steps: build the valid request from the runtime-supplied method, path, auth, and known-valid body
send the request to the one local target
validate the response body against the documented 2xx schema with ajv v8
assert additionalProperties:false, every required field present and typed, list items each valid and the list non-empty, and Content-Type application/json
